lines.speaker: Osvald
lines.text: Welcome to the Miscellania food store. We've only opened recently.

lines.speaker: Osvald
lines.text: Would you like to buy anything, Your Royal Highness?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you show me what you have for sale?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you, I don't need food just now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it like living down here?

lines.speaker: Osvald
lines.text: The town's thriving. I'm sure it'll soon be as busy as Rellekka!

lines.speaker: Osvald
lines.text: Welcome to the Miscellania food store. We've only opened recently.

lines.speaker: Osvald
lines.text: Would you like to buy anything, Your Royal Highness?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it like living down here?

lines.speaker: Osvald
lines.text: The town's growing larger, and business is doing well.

lines.speaker: Osvald
lines.text: I'm worried about the stories I've heard about monsters, though.

lines.speaker: Osvald
lines.text: I heard that one of the dwarves saw monsters in the other caves!

lines.speaker: Osvald
lines.text: I don't know more than that, so you'd have to ask the dwarves.
